name: QuickDrop
desc: A MERN-based grocery delivery app with real-time tracking, AI recipe suggestions, smart pantry management, and secure PayPal and Stripe payments.

name: BookZone
desc: A MERN-powered library management system for handling books, users, and borrowing records with an efficient digital workflow.

name: EliteMart
desc: A modern e-commerce platform offering product browsing, secure shopping, great deals, and a smooth user experience.

name: ShortiFy
desc: A URL shortener built with Node.js, Express, and MongoDB that generates compact links and redirects users seamlessly.

name: MyAuthApp
desc: A secure authentication system featuring registration, JWT sessions, email verification, and password reset support.

name: PokeCards
desc: A React app that fetches Pokémon data from a public API, allowing users to search and explore detailed information.

name: MiniProjects
desc: A collection of interactive web tools including a translator, GitHub viewer, gradient generator, BMI, and currency converter.

name: AG BookStore
desc: A JavaScript-based online bookstore with cart management, purchases, and account handling powered by LocalStorage.

name: EveryDay Eats
desc: A recipe discovery app with step-by-step instructions, search functionality, and meals from cuisines around the world.

name: Language Tranlator
desc: A multilingual translator with real-time translation, speech recognition, and text-to-speech powered by APIs.

name: FoodHub
desc: A modern restaurant management interface designed to deliver a smooth, responsive, and user-friendly experience.
